definitions: A situation in which one can enjoy the advantages of two different things at the same time.
Having the benefits of two contrasting situations without any of the disadvantages.
examples: Working from home gives me the best of both worlds: I can be with my family and still advance my career.
Her new job offers the best of both worlds, combining her passion for art with a stable income.
Living in the city but having a cabin in the mountains is truly the best of both worlds.
